data.title: Letting Home Sellers Test the Waters Before Listing Could Boost Housing Supply as Much as 12%
data.description: In Seattle, Redfin economists predict a potential boost of 6%-12% in annual housing inventory levels, particularly in markets allowing home sellers to experiment with pricing strategies through 'Private Exclusive' and 'Coming Soon' listings before officially listing their properties. This insight comes from a recent report by Redfin, the real estate agency partnered with Rocket. Redfin's Senior Economist Asad Khan highlighted the uniqueness of each home as a factor contributing to this trend.

data.title: WeShop Launches “For Mums Everywhere” £500 Mother’s Day Holiday Competition to Celebrate the Women Who Raised Us
data.description: WeShop is rolling out a competition named "For Mums Everywhere," offering a £500 Mother's Day holiday prize to honor the special women who raised us. This initiative aims to celebrate the selfless dedication of mothers and show appreciation for their hard work and love. The competition encourages participants to nominate deserving mothers for a chance to win the £500 holiday reward. The competition is part of WeShop's ongoing efforts to recognize the invaluable role of mothers in our lives and express gratitude for their contributions.

data.title: A4A Statement on TSA's $0 Paychecks
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Washington, A4A President and CEO Chris Sununu expressed concern about tens of thousands of TSA employees not receiving paychecks. The employees received no payment this time, after receiving partial pay two weeks ago. This issue has been ongoing since the fall.

data.title: University of Phoenix Scholars Publish Study on Academic Applications of Generative AI in Higher Education
data.description: A research team at the Center for Educational and Instructional Technology has conducted a study on the ethical and methodological utilization of generative artificial intelligence in higher education. The study was led by scholars from the University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies, including Patricia Akojie, Ph.D. The findings were released in Phoenix on March 13, 2026. This research is significant as it explores the responsible application of AI in higher education settings, aiming to address key ethical concerns and provide valuable insights for academic institutions.

data.title: Auction Direct USA of Raleigh Offers Quick and Affordable Windshield Wiper Replacement Services
data.description: Auction Direct USA located in Raleigh, North Carolina is offering drivers a chance to take care of their spring maintenance needs. As of March 13, 2026, they are providing windshield wiper replacement services to ensure improved visibility and driving comfort. This initiative aims to enhance road safety for motorists.

data.title: Procurement Sciences Achieves FedRAMP Moderate Authorization
data.description: A recently developed AI platform designed specifically for government contractors to enhance their ability to secure and complete more contracts has successfully achieved compliance with the federal government's top cloud security requirement for unclassified systems. Located in RICHMOND, Va., this platform, known as Procurement Sciences, is now the sole provider of a fully secure AI solution. This achievement was marked on March 13, 2026. This platform aims to help government contractors streamline their operations and increase their contract acquisition rate, ultimately leading to improved efficiency and growth in the sector.

data.title: PHX Energy Services Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Calgary-based PHX Energy Services Corp. revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share for its shareholders. The dividend is classified as an “eligible dividend” under subsection 89(1) of the Income Tax Act (Canada). Shareholders as of the closing of business on March 31, 2026, will be eligible for the payment on April 15, 2026.

data.title: This Is Elon Musk's Latest Optimus 3 Production Timeline
data.description: Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla, announced plans to unveil a new version of the Optimus robot annually. Tesla's stock faced a slight decline throughout the week as it battled to maintain essential support levels. The latest production timeline for Optimus 3 was shared, indicating a strategic move by Musk to continually innovate in this sector. This update suggests a forward-looking approach by Tesla, targeting regular advancements in its robotic technology offerings.

data.title: Village Super Market, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On March 13, 2026, the Board of Directors of Village Super Market, Inc. declared quarterly cash dividends of $0.25 for each Class A common share and $0.1625 for each Class B common share. Shareholders of record at the close of business on April 2, 2026, will receive the dividends on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Microvast Schedules Fourth Quarter Earnings Call
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Microvast Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MVST), a prominent player in advanced battery technologies, announced that it will release its financial results for the entirety of 2025 and the fourth quarter after the market closes on Monday, March 16, 2026. This global leader's report will provide insight into its performance over the year, offering stakeholders valuable information to assess the company's trajectory and position in the market.

data.title: Investview Announces Official Launch of myLife Wellness, Establishing a New Consumer Health & Wellness Business Unit
data.description: Investview, Inc. (OTCQB: INVU) based in Haverford, PA, revealed the launch of myLife Wellness, a consumer health and wellness division on March 13, 2026. This unit, operated under Renu Laboratories, will market and sell specialized wellness products. The move aligns with Investview's strategy as a diversified financial technology and consumer products company.

data.title: CUPE Ontario and Ontario NDP Challenge Conservatives’ Claims on Bill 60 and Water Privatization With Damning Legal Opinion
data.description: In Toronto, the true intentions behind the Ford Conservatives' plans to privatize Ontario's water were revealed as CUPE Ontario and the Ontario NDP, along with a lawyer from Goldblatt Partners LLP, disclosed a legal opinion on Bill 60, the Fighting Delays, Building Faster Act, 2025. The legal review of Schedule 16 of Bill 60 was commissioned by CUPE Ontario in their opposition to the Ford government's efforts to privatize publicly owned regional water systems.

Volland SPX Spot-Vol Beta: -0.77 This gauge measures how much the VIX is reacting relative to the S&P 500’s price move. A reading of -0.77 suggests volatility is under-reacting, meaning options traders are not aggressively increasing downside protection despite the market move.
